pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.2 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 21 and Jakarta dependencies causes classpath conflicts and missing API errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the managed Java version property from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project targets Java 21; keeping the property at 17 would result in incorrect compiler settings if referenced, though the plugin config change below is the primary enforcement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy javax.mail dependency with the Jakarta EE equivalent.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Java EE 9+ moved from javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces; the old javax.mail artifact is incompatible and will cause ClassNotFoundExceptions at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new Jakarta-compatible version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old mysql-connector-java artifact uses javax.sql interfaces which are removed/renamed in Jakarta EE; the new mysql-connector-j artifact is required for compatibility with Spring Boot 3.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin from source/target configuration to the release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The release flag is the modern standard for cross-compilation and ensures consistent module path usage in Java 21; while source/target might still work, release is required for proper module system handling in newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Flyway MySQL module dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: Flyway requires specific database modules to be present on the classpath to connect to MySQL; without this, Flyway will fail to initialize the MySQL connector at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Lombok MapStruct binding dependency to annotation processor paths.
pom.xml.why_exists: MapStruct and Lombok require this binding to coexist correctly during annotation processing; without it, MapStruct may fail to process Lombok-generated getters/setters, leading to compilation errors.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on Java 21 with the upgraded framework.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with WebSecurityCustomizer bean for ignoring public paths.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter was deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0; extending it causes a compile error in Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Replace deprecated HttpSecurity configure method with SecurityFilterChain bean using lambda DSL.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: The protected configure(HttpSecurity) method was removed in Spring Security 6.0; overriding it causes a compile error. Additionally, antMatcher and authorizeRequests APIs were replaced by securityMatcher and authorizeHttpRequests.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.before:
@Override
    protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {
        http.antMatcher("/secured/**")
            .addFilterBefore(preAuthFilter(), RequestHeaderAuthenticationFilter.class)
            .authenticationProvider(preAuthProvider())
            .authorizeRequests()
            .anyRequest().authenticated()
            .and()
            .sessionManagement().sessionCreationPolicy(STATELESS)
            .and()
            .httpBasic().disable()
            .csrf().disable()
            .formLogin().disable()
            .logout().disable();
    }

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/domain/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/domain/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors.
